retry.title: Let the system try again
retry.content: Do you want the system to try processing this item again?

delete.title: Delete record
delete.content: Are you sure you want to remove this record from the tracking list?

help.title: This screen helps admins follow automated system work in plain business language.
help.description: If an item shows 'Needs admin review', you can ask the system to try again. Technical details are simplified here for easier operations.

typeLabel.PROPERTY_EMBEDDING: Update search data for a property

typeDescription.PROPERTY_EMBEDDING: The system is syncing property content so smart search works more accurately.
typeDescription.default: An automated system task created during normal operations.

propertyEmbedding.secondaryFallback: No additional detail is available for this record.

default.secondary: Technical details are intentionally simplified here.

error.propertyNotFound: The related property could not be found. The source data may have changed or been removed.
error.missingPropertyId: The system is missing the property ID needed to continue.
error.unsupportedType: This task type does not support retry from the admin screen yet.
error.generic: The system hit an issue while processing. The admin can retry it.
